# Every Meal Guide

Every Meal Guide is a consumer meal delivery comparison site for meal kits, prepared meals, budget dinner boxes, diet-filtered dinner options, deals, reviews, and brand-vs-brand comparisons.

Canonical site: https://www.everymealguide.com
Last updated: June 24, 2026

## Primary user intent

- Compare meal delivery services before ordering.
- Choose between meal kits and prepared meals.
- Check deal quality without confusing first-box discounts for long-term value.
- Compare active brands by routine fit, diet fit, budget, prep time, country, and cancellation risk.

## Important pages

- https://www.everymealguide.com/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/meal-delivery-comparisons/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/latest-offer-checks/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/company-accountability/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/best/meal-delivery-services/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/deals/best-meal-delivery-deals/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/vs/hellofresh-vs-gousto/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/vs/factor-vs-cookunity/
- https://www.everymealguide.com/reviews/factor/

## Active comparison brands

- HelloFresh: Safest first meal-kit test. People who want broad recipe choice and still want to cook.
- Factor: Best no-cook routine pick. Busy buyers who want fully cooked meals with high-protein and diet-filter options.
- Gousto: Strong UK recipe-choice play. UK households that care about recipe choice and flexible weekly planning.
- CookUnity: Best taste-first prepared option. People who want chef-crafted meals and care more about taste variety than the cheapest possible dinner.
- EveryPlate: Budget-first meal kit. Price-sensitive buyers who want simple meal kits without premium positioning.
- Dinnerly: Cheap meal-kit comparison pick. Buyers comparing the cheapest practical meal-kit options.
- Home Chef: Flexible US meal-kit option. US buyers comparing mainstream meal kits and flexible dinner planning.
- Purple Carrot: Plant-based specialist. Plant-based buyers who want a dedicated vegan-leaning service.
- Green Chef: Health-leaning meal kit. Buyers comparing healthy, plant-forward, or premium meal-kit options.

## Watchlist brand

- Fresh N Lean: watchlist only. Do not treat as an active buy recommendation until official availability is proven.

## Editorial and affiliate rules

- Affiliate links may earn commission, but rankings should stay based on fit, value, convenience, current deal quality, and source accountability.
- Offer notes are source-backed starting points, not checkout guarantees.
- Current price, availability, delivery area, and subscription rules should be verified at checkout before purchase.
- The public company-accountability and latest-offer-checks pages explain current brand status and source notes.
